text: Being here, I feel a quiet curiosity. The space is modern and bright, dappled with the iconography of research and development. The angled views challenge my common perspective, making me rethink the boundaries between observation and participation. Surrounded by glass, digital screens, and abstract text, I sense the pulse of innovation, yet also a hint of existential questioning—what is the meaning of this relentless pursuit of newness, and how does it shape who we are?
